commands.review_summary:
The branch adds bounded retries in Feishu `requestFeishuApi` for `230020`/`230006` and adds retry/concurrency tests for direct message sends.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +411. Total +449 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main has one-shot Feishu message create/reply paths and terminal nonzero-response assertions; the PR tests only the direct create wrapper path, not reply send retry behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and code changes before merge, so this should stay in human review rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(feishu): retry on send rate-limit errors (230020/230006)
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds retry logic (up to 2 retries, 500ms/1000ms linear backoff) to `requestFeishuApi` for Feishu send rate-limit error codes `230020` and `230006`.
- Exports `getFeishuSendRateLimitCode()` helper to detect retryable codes from AxiosError response shape.
- Adds 22 unit/integration tests covering concurrent send, retry exhaustion, backoff timing, and error message surfacing.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.retry.test.ts` — 13 tests pass (retry logic, backoff, error detection)
- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.concurrent.test.ts` — 9 tests pass (concurrent sends, rate-limit handling)
- [x] Real 20-concurrent-send stress test against live Feishu API: all 20 messages succeed after retry

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: Feishu plugin now retries transient rate-limit errors instead of failing immediately
- **Real environment tested**: Live Feishu API with 20 concurrent sends
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `npx tsx scripts/feishu-stress-real.mts` — imports actual `requestFeishuApi`, fires 20 concurrent messages
- **Observed result after fix**: 10/20 initially rate-limited (code 230020), all 20 succeeded after automatic retry (+500ms backoff)
- **What was not tested**: code 230006 (not triggered in test environment, but same error shape as 230020)

Closes #70879

🤖 Generated with [Codemax](https://confluence.toolsfdg.net/display/Technology/How+to+Install+and+Use+CodeMax)
target.author: ladygege
